subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! Victory is of two kinds: the conquest of fortresses and the conquest of hearts. The vanquishing of fortresses is easily accomplished, for it requireth but a measure of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق فتح بدو قسم است فتوح قلاع و فتوح قلوب فتح قلاع آسانست زیرا بمقداری
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @The Holy Spirit, @Greatest Name
